---
title: Slashdot Problem Set 1
author: 
---

# Problems

There will be three problems with various difficulty. 

## Question 1

Given an `array[]` of `n` numbers. Check if there exists two numbers in `array` such that sum is `x`.

Give an algorithm for this task which does this task in $\mathcal{O}(N)$ time.

## Question 2

The following ciphertext has been encrypted with a stadndard Vignere Cipher. Standard 26 letter alphabet.

HVNZTABRFOAOADBBZFVDBRVHQZTQUYEIIHDNBLYYIVYYWOYYQKCKEVRTLUZJZZGBWNCZVWMOIFVVRUZACGEQWPPABZLHOEKDGNXPUJBANVVGXEMMEQAAKZHUGEQXEYOVPWTHNCLGAVPMGIWGSEEZVZASWPUFFGROEAZZPZNFGEVRX.

Length of the KEY is $l$. 

$$l = \sum_{n = 1}^{\infty}\frac{n^{3}}{2^{n+1}}$$

Find the KEY.

## Question 3

Write and explain the program for a toy spell checker.

Check your solution on the [Corpora of misspellings](https://www.dcs.bbk.ac.uk/~roger/corpora.html).
